source_note: Arizona Corporation Commission Decision No. 79065 (docketed August 25, 2023), Docket No. E-01933A-22-0107, in the matter of the application of Tucson Electric Power Company (TEP) for a rate increase — approving a revenue increase of $100,130,000 (8.93%) with a 9.55% return on equity, rates effective September 1, 2023 (189 pp, born-digital).
